name: Ray Parrella's Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Small pasta, medium shells or fusilli
2 cups Chopped fresh vegetables (such as broccoli or cauliflower florets, fresh tomatoes, carrots, sweet pepper, green onion, zucchini or summer squash)
1 cup Tuna, chicken or seafood (cooked or canned)
recipeInstructions:
Vegetables can include all or some of the following: broccoli or cauliflower florets, fresh tomatoes, carrots, sweet pepper, green onion, zucchini or summer squash.
1. To make the dressing, combine all ingredients in a large decanter and mix well. Refrigerate.
2. Cook pasta according to package directions. Drain and rinse. Coat with a little dressing and toss to prevent sticking. Store in a covered container in the refrigerator.
3. Before serving, heat the pasta for 30 seconds in the microwave. Add vegetables and tuna, chicken or seafood. Toss with a little more dressing. Serve on lettuce-lined plates.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings
